use_cases: Triggering actions or submitting forms across any application interface
Navigation triggers with link variant for internal routing
Destructive action triggers with dedicated destructive variant styling
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Uses CSS custom shadows and focus-visible outlines for polish. Designed as a reusable atomic component for building larger UI systems.
